kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Handle Alert
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Handle Alert
kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Alert Text: I am a JS Confirm Message: unexpected alert open: {Alert text : I am a JS Confirm} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.165) Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6183529c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61807a0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff617dddb2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff617e8461b] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff617e29298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff617e2a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61837de0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff618378588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff618399d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff618096785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff61809facc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff618083634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff6180837e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff618067e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffa5e82e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffa6004c48c+2c]
kw.doc: Handles the current alert and returns its message.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text Into Alert
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into an input field in an alert.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
